idea-plugin.name: Kotlin Function File Icon
idea-plugin.description: Change the icon of a Kotlin file when it has a toplevel function with the same name as the file.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
- Change file icon when a val/var matches file's name
- Special file icon for @Composable functions
- Change file icon when a typealias matches file's name
- Fix file icon when a toplevel class have adjacent elements
